Suphal Bhattarai

Audit Associate | Experience since January 2024

Audit Associate with live experience since January 2024, exposure across 14 sectors, and a current focus on banking, finance, and IT opportunities. Work includes audit, financial, and consulting assignments performed within NFRS and IFRS reporting contexts.
